= index-terms-test(1)
:doctype: manpage
:manmanual: Test Manual
:mansource: Test 1.0
:revdate: 2025-06-01

== Name

index-terms-test - test index term rendering

== Synopsis

*index-terms-test*

== Description

A ((cat)) is a domestic animal.

We also mention a indexterm2:[dog] in the text.

Concealed terms: (((Animals, Mammals, Cats)))visible text after concealed.
